series_metadata.series_description: Includes all vouchers submitted for payment

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain two (2) years onsite plus two (2) years offsite after audit and fiscal close of fiscal year in which created. An exception is created for for construction manager payments, which are retained onsite during the active period of the project then four (four) years after audit and fiscal close of project ; Electronic: Retain four (4) years, except for construction manager payments, which are retained during the active period fo the project then four (4) years after audit and fiscal close of project, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
